backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing habit tracking with per-user scoping via Principal, including CRUD for habits, executions (markComplete/unmarkComplete), and user profiles, with role-based access control via MixinAuthorization.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms the old single-user habit store into a per-Principal map of habits, preserving the nextHabitId counter.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping three implemented features (login page, per-user habit scoping, clickable chart popover) to their source files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend codebase.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for the full design token set (colors, radius, chart palette) in both light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point titled 'Habit Tracker' that mounts the React app at the #root div and loads the main TSX module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that gates rendering on authentication state: shows LoginPage for unauthenticated users, a spinner during loading, ProfileSetupModal for new users, and HabitsPage inside Layout for fully authenticated users.
frontend/src/components/AddHabitForm.tsx: Controlled form component with a text input and submit button for creating new habits, clearing the input on success and showing a spinner while the mutation is pending.
frontend/src/components/CompletedHabitsP: Popover component that displays a formatted date header and a scrollable list of habit names completed on a given day, with an empty-state message when none exist.
frontend/src/components/HabitCalendar.ts: Monthly calendar grid component with month navigation that renders each day as a toggleable button reflecting completion status, dispatching markComplete or unmarkComplete mutations on click.
frontend/src/components/HabitCard.tsx: Renders a single habit card with a today-completion toggle, streak display, delete confirmation dialog, and an expandable calendar view using React Query mutations.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Provides the app shell with a sticky header (logo, user profile, logout button), a centered main content area, and a footer with attribution link.
frontend/src/components/MonthlyHabitsCha: Displays a bar chart of daily habit completions for a given month with prev/next navigation and a popover showing which habits were completed on a clicked day.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that prompts a new user to enter their display name on first login, blocking dismissal until a name is saved via the saveProfile mutation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) based on the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity auth context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status to the component tree.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for habit CRUD operations (get, create, delete, mark/unmark complete) and user profile fetching/saving, each using the backend actor and invalidating relevant query caches on mutation success.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for a warm-toned light/dark theme including colors for background, card, accent, habit completion, and sidebar.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/HabitsPage.tsx: Main habits page that displays a list of habit cards with loading skeletons, an add-habit form, best streak info, today's completion count, and a navigable monthly completions chart.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login/landing page that presents app branding, feature highlights, and an Internet Identity sign-in button with loading state handling.
frontend/src/utils/calendarHelpers.ts: Utility functions for generating a monthly calendar grid with padding days, checking day completion against habit executions, formatting month names, and navigating between months.
frontend/src/utils/chartHelpers.ts: Utility functions for aggregating daily habit completion counts for a given month, generating day arrays, formatting month/year labels, and retrieving habit names completed on a specific date.
frontend/src/utils/dateHelpers.ts: Provides utility functions for converting between JS Date objects and backend bigint Unix timestamps, plus helpers for streak calculation, date formatting, and completion checking.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utilities for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence helpers for maintaining values like auth tokens across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom theme tokens including OKLCH-based color palette, custom fonts (Nunito/Inter), border radii, box shadows, and chart colors, with typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state (version 7) for a multi-user Habit Tracker app, listing existing features, architectural notes, known issues, and feature metadata for build planning.
